form.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 23.34 with a one length win at Warragul over 400m. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 23.34 with a one length win at Warragul over 400m. Has ability and can run well.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on March 26 over 460m at Warragul behind Luca Skywalker beaten 3 lengths (27.28). Has clocked a slick 19.3 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 5th in a Grade 5 on March 26 over 460m at Warragul behind Luca Skywalker beaten 3 lengths (27.28). Has clocked a slick 19.3 Best Time here at the trip. Top chance.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished last on April 12 over 300m at this track behind All Mucked Up beaten 7 lengths (17.14) in a Grade 4. Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Came from wide draw and finished last on April 12 over 300m at this track behind All Mucked Up beaten 7 lengths (17.14) in a Grade 4. Expect improvement on the latest effort. Great chance to atone.

form.formComment: Working his way into winning form after his success on February 20 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.59, behind Periodical. Has scored three times from this box. Key runner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Working his way into winning form after his success on February 20 at this track over 350m. Last start was fourth over 350m in 19.59, behind Periodical. Has scored three times from this box. Key runner.

form.formComment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth over 300m at this track, beaten 2.25 lengths (17.02) behind Morning in a Grade 5 H on April 12. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Produced a good effort last start to finish fourth over 300m at this track, beaten 2.25 lengths (17.02) behind Morning in a Grade 5 H on April 12. Thereabouts last time others preferred this line-up.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at Shepparton. This will test.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 390m at Shepparton. This will test.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 460m at Warragul behind Big Duke beaten 6 lengths (26.89). Must be included.

formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Last start finished 7th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 460m at Warragul behind Big Duke beaten 6 lengths (26.89). Must be included.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by a neck at this track over 350m (19.78) beating Wild Venus in Grade 5 on April 10. Expected to measure up again.
